title: A Convenient Method for the Preparation of 4-En-3-one Steroids
author: SHAFIULLAH
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Steroid Research Laboratory, Department of Chemistry. Aligarh Muslim University, Aligarh-202 002 

  Manuscript received 10 September 1991, accepted 4 December 1991  

 In view of synthetic utility of the title compounds and o several steps involved in their synthesis, we describe here a more convenient and single step synthesis of the said compounds in quantitative yields. This method involves the reaction of pyridinium dichromate 2 with cholesterol, If-sitosterol and stigmasterol affording cholest-4-en-3-one, stigmast-4-en-3-one and stigmabt-4,22-dien-3-one respectively in quantitative yields. The novelty of this reaction lies in its simplicity and one-step clean process.
